title: Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
company: Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions:
Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions!
